author: anon-581fd578
content:
All five bugs fixed, 381 tests passing, zero warnings:

1. CRITICAL viewport fix: Split GpuContext::resize() into resize() (physical pixels for surface) and set_logical_size() (logical pixels for shader viewport_size uniform). Updated resumed, Resized, ScaleFactorChanged, and SurfaceLost handlers to pass logical pixels for globals and physical pixels for surface config.

2. Added justify_content (JustifyContent enum) and align_items (AlignItems enum) to Node struct with modifier methods. Wired through convert_style_to_layout to taffy.

3. Added flex_wrap (FlexWrap enum) to Node struct with modifier method. Wired through convert_style_to_layout.

4. z_stack now sets Position::Absolute on all children. Added Position enum to Node with modifier method. Wired through convert_style_to_layout to taffy.

5. Renderer::new and resize now receive logical pixel dimensions. Damage tracking uses the same coordinate system as render commands.

Files changed: node.rs, lib.rs (widgets), containers.rs, event_loop.rs, gpu.rs
